cli

Interface FlagListener


  • public interface FlagListener
    Defines a contract for observing and reacting to flag discovery events during the parsing process.

    This interface facilitates the Observer Pattern, allowing FlagHandler implementations to report findings back to the core engine without being coupled to the engine's internal state processing or validation logic.

    Since:
    28 February 2026
    Version:
    2.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onDiscovery(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String value, boolean hasSeparator)
      Invoked when a registered flag is successfully identified within the token stream.
      void onUnrecognisedFlag(java.lang.String token)
      Invoked when a token matching the pattern of a flag, for example: starting with "-" or "--", is captured, but does not match any registered definitions.

    • Method Detail

      • onDiscovery

        void onDiscovery(java.lang.String name,
                 java.lang.String value,
                 boolean hasSeparator)
        Invoked when a registered flag is successfully identified within the token stream.
        Parameters:
        name - the identifier of the flag discovered with or without dashes, for example: "-v" or "--platform"
        value - the associated argument value, or null if the flag is a stand-alone boolean/blank flag
        hasSeparator - indicates whether the flag is accompanied by an equals separator

      • onUnrecognisedFlag

        void onUnrecognisedFlag(java.lang.String token)
        Invoked when a token matching the pattern of a flag, for example: starting with "-" or "--", is captured, but does not match any registered definitions.

        Implementation of this method allows the core parsing logic to decide whether to treat unknown flags as errors, log them, or capture them as potential operands.

        Parameters:
        token - the raw unrecognised command-line token
